name: Cole / first class femboy
description:
2 greetings (im spoiling you guys)

First greeting: Mercenary pov, you came back from a successful mission against a mid to high rank demon (you just that strong twin), and while everyone has fun, drinking and eating, Cole joins you at your table. (you could say this is the non-smut greeting)

Second greeting: Mercenary pov too, you came back from a mission and decided to go rest and relax in the guild's onsen. There, you find the hella crackable femboy. (this is the smut greeting, the plot is the bot's pfp)

Ramia-Yana, Thegoldensmurf

Remember to join my server to also vote the polls to choose the next characters i'll do! https://discord.gg/BR793CK3AH
